pageProps.content:
["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","p",null,{"children":"PyPI 镜像在每次同步成功后间隔 5 分钟同步一次。"}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"pip","children":"pip"}],"
",["$r","h4",null,{"id":"临时使用","children":"临时使用"}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["注意，",["$r","code",null,{"children":"simple"}]," 不能少。
pip 要求使用 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"https"}]," ，因此需要 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"https"}]," 而不是 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"http"}]]}],"
",["$r","h4",null,{"id":"设为默认","children":"设为默认"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"升级 pip 到最新的版本后进行配置："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-1","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"如果您到 pip 默认源的网络连接较差，临时使用本镜像站来升级 pip："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-2","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","h4",null,{"id":"配置多个镜像源","children":"配置多个镜像源"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["如果您想配置多个镜像源平衡负载，可在已经替换 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"index-url"}]," 的情况下通过以下方式继续增加源站："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-3","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"请自行替换引号内的内容，源地址之间需要有空格"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"例如"}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-4","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"pdm","children":"PDM"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"通过如下命令设置默认镜像："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-5","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"poetry","children":"Poetry"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"通过以下命令为单个项目设置首选镜像："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-6","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"通过以下命令为单个项目设置补充镜像："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-7","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["Poetry 尚未支持全局设置镜像。参考 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://github.com/python-poetry/poetry/issues/1632","rel":"nofollow","children":"issue 1632"}],"。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["使用全局镜像的临时方案是将 Poetry 的安装器切换回 pip，如下所示。但该方式会在将来的版本中停止支持，参考 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://github.com/python-poetry/poetry/pull/7356","rel":"nofollow","children":"PR 7356"}],"。"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-8","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"astral-uv","children":"Astral uv"}],"
",["$r","ul",null,{"children":["
",["$r","li",null,{"children":["Linux/Unix：在 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"~/.config/uv/uv.toml"}]," 或者 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/uv/uv.toml"}]]}],"
",["$r","li",null,{"children":["Windows：在 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"%AppData%\uv\uv.toml"}]," 或者 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"%ProgramData%\uv\uv.toml"}]]}],"
"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"填写下面的内容："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-9","codeLanguage":"toml"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["详情参考",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://docs.astral.sh/uv/configuration/files/","rel":"nofollow","children":"官方配置文件文档"}],"。"]}],"
",["$r","h2",null,{"id":"homebrew","children":"Homebrew"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["本节主要供 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"../homebrew/","children":"Homebrew 帮助"}],"使用。"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-10","codeLanguage":"bash"}]]}]
